---
name: reverse-engineer-legacy
description: Reverse engineer a legacy codebase into KB-ready findings including inferred features current workflows integrations and open questions.
argument-hint: A legacy directory path, module name, or code area to reconstruct.
---

Read the target legacy code and use the legacy-code-scanner skill to infer current feature behavior. Separate Next.js and Python surfaces, list entrypoints and workflows, and produce draft KB-ready findings with explicit open questions where behavior is uncertain.
